overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a sunlit urban district in Night City. The player moves from a narrow alley with modular buildings and trash piles into an open plaza and then along a sidewalk featuring prominent '6th Street' gang graffiti, with pedestrians and futuristic skyscrapers visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley with yellow modular buildings and accumulated trash

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow path between a yellow modular building and trash piles

notable_agents.action: person in blue shirt and jeans walking away from camera
couple standing against wall near advertising poster

entered.detail: prefabricated yellow structure with solar panels mounted on roof
blue photovoltaic panels on top of the modular building
large black garbage bags and scattered debris accumulated on ground
large vertical red advertisement poster with '35V15' text and figure
blue advertisement poster for 'Señor Machismo' with food imagery
tall palm trees visible in the distance against blue sky

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a narrow urban alley in Night City. A yellow modular building with solar panels dominates the left side while trash piles line the right. Sparse pedestrians are visible, including a couple standing near advertising posters. The path is enclosed with limited sky visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with concrete seating and stairs

events.description: exits narrow alley into open plaza area with concrete benches and planters
turns right to approach concrete stairs and continue along path

agents.ego_description: navigating through an open plaza area, turning right toward a stairway

notable_agents.action: person with green hair and red pants walking toward camera
child in yellow jacket and blue pants walking along path

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with multiple steps leading upward
rectangular concrete planters containing small bushes
long concrete wall covered with colorful graffiti and street art

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a sunlit plaza with concrete benches and stairs. The camera moves through moderate pedestrian traffic including a distinctive person with green hair. The yellow building from the previous segment falls behind as a long graffiti-covered wall comes into view on the right, and the ground transitions to concrete pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk along extensive graffiti wall with corporate towers visible

events.description: transitions from plaza to sidewalk alongside long graffiti-covered wall with 6th Street tags
passing prominent 6th Street gang graffiti featuring American flag motifs

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to the graffiti wall, observing passing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person with purple beanie and red hair walking toward camera
person with arm tattoos and sunglasses walking along wall

entered.detail: tall futuristic skyscraper with large '07' signage visible on facade
asphalt road with red curbs running parallel to sidewalk
elevated highway structure visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows a long walk along a sidewalk bordered by an extensive graffiti wall featuring prominent '6th Street' gang tags with American flag motifs. The tall '07' building dominates the left skyline while various pedestrians walk in the opposing direction. The environment maintains a warm, sunlit atmosphere with clear views of the distant city infrastructure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a claustrophobic urban alleyway into a wide, sun-drenched city plaza and along a sprawling sidewalk. It begins by navigating a narrow passage flanked by a yellow modular building with solar panels and piles of trash, where the sky is mostly obscured by towering structures. As the camera moves forward, the enclosed space opens into a bright plaza filled with concrete benches and pedestrians, leaving the yellow building behind as the ground transitions to open pavement. The scene then shifts toward a long sidewalk bordered by an extensive wall of 6th Street gang graffiti and American flag motifs, while the skyline expands to reveal the massive 07 building. Finally, the camera continues its path through the warm sunlight, passing opposing pedestrians against a backdrop of distant futuristic city infrastructure.
